themes.headline: MAIDEN ANALYST CALL POST-LISTING (Oct 16, 2025) — historic moment
themes.detail: Listed on Oct 16, 2025; this is the first earnings call as a listed entity.

themes.headline: Second-oldest AMC: established 1993 as Canbank Investment Management
themes.detail: Became Canara Robeco AMC in 2007 via Canara Bank + Robeco JV (now ORIX-owned).

themes.headline: Three decades of legacy provides a trust + brand moat
themes.detail: Combines Indian institutional reach (Canara Bank) with global investment heritage (Robeco).

channelMix.note: Canara Bank parent channel; broad MFD reach

events.label: Listed on Indian exchanges on October 16, 2025 (IPO)

quotes.text: It is indeed for us a privilege as well as a historic moment; it is our first analyst call post our listing on the 16th of October.
quotes.speaker: Rajnish Narula, MD & CEO
